docket_entries.description: NTC OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. FKA MBNA AMERICA BANK N.A. HEARING SET FOR JUL-20-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
